title: Integrate Gladiator Studio
lede: One API connection. The full catalogue of high-volatility, crypto-native titles — backed by the same infrastructure that powers MetaWin's global casino.

valueProps.title: Full catalogue, single integration
valueProps.body: A single REST connection gives you all 8 Gladiator slots and 26 MetaWin Originals — no per-title integration work.

valueProps.title: MetaWin-grade reliability
valueProps.body: Runs on the same AWS + GCP infrastructure serving MetaWin's global casino: sub-100ms round-trips and a 99.99% uptime SLA.

valueProps.title: ULTRA-volatility, crypto-native
valueProps.body: Engineered for the crypto-native player — high win ceilings, provably fair maths, and published RTPs above 96%.

steps.body: Tell us your platform and target markets. We set you up with sandbox credentials and integration docs.
JSON-based REST docs, a full sandbox environment, and a dedicated technical account manager from day one.
Certified RNG with audit trails, published and testable RTPs, and compliance documentation for licensed jurisdictions on request.

specs: Real-time bet data via the feeder
complianceBody: Every Gladiator title is certified, testable, and ready for licensed jurisdictions — with documentation on request.
compliancePoints: Certified RNG with full audit trails
Published, testable RTPs across every integration

faqs.a: Typically weeks, not quarters — a single REST integration with a sandbox from day one and a dedicated technical account manager.

faqs.q: Which markets are you live in?
faqs.a: Seven regulated markets today, with active expansion into new jurisdictions.
Yes — certified RNG, published and testable RTPs, and compliance documentation available on request.
We're built crypto-native — both fiat and crypto wallets are supported, settled in your base currency.

faqs.q: What partner support do we get?
faqs.a: A dedicated technical account manager from first integration through live operations.

closingTitle: Ready to add Gladiator to your lobby?
closingBody: Our partnerships team takes you from first call to live integration — typically in weeks, not quarters.
